positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a vibrant, stylized nocturnal forest scene. Feature elegant bioluminescent flora, stylized crescent moons, and whimsical forest spirits among ancient, gnarled trees. The style should be modern, clean, and highly graphic, resembling Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Scandinavian minimalism. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, luminous cyan, and accents of metallic gold. Composition must be central and symmetrical, designed for seamless repeat printing on fabric. Strong silhouettes, clean linework, high contrast black and white overlay with selective vibrant coloring. Vector art quality, flat graphic design, suitable for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, fuzzy, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, low detail
